verdict_policy.damage_axis: single-target engines use damage.delivered_per_action; area engines use area_damage.normalized_total; hybrid units use max(delivered_per_action, normalized_total)
verdict_policy.majority_pareto_dominance: best-or-tied in at least 3 of 5 axes and not worst in any axis

method.description: Aggregates accepted W3 proxy rows and parent formula damage into W5 real roster party rows.
method.damage_units: HP-equivalent expected action value; area rows keep separate area_damage.
method.non_damage_axes: Proxy points from accepted concrete rows: sustain HP, control/tempo/status pressure, mobility, and safety/defense.

damage_conventions.physical_formula: per_armor_damage = floor(raw_pressure * engine_multiplier * response_layers[armor]); delivered_per_action = hit_count * hit_rate * sum(armor_mix[armor] * per_armor_damage)
damage_conventions.floor_order: engine_multiplier/pressure support is inside the per-armor floor; hit_count is applied after per-armor floor and armor-mix weighting
damage_conventions.display_identity: damage.per_hit * hit_count * engine_multiplier equals displayed delivered_per_action; this is a reporting identity, not the physical recomputation rule
damage_conventions.top_source: top_source uses max(single_target delivered_per_action, area normalized_total) per unit and never sums alternative actions from the same unit

magic_area_constants.rounding: nearest integer for spell per-target HP values; JSON area totals preserve decimal target-count products

Titan_mid.formula: per_target = round(ma * k * 0.6); expected_total = per_target * expected_targets

Ifrit_mid.formula: per_target = round(ma * k * 0.6); expected_total = per_target * expected_targets

Bahamut_late.formula: per_target = round(ma * k * 0.6); expected_total = per_target * expected_targets

Meteor_late.formula: per_target = round(ma * k * 0.6); expected_total = per_target * expected_targets

chapter_4_ultima_K22_late.formula: accepted doc57 K22 late Ultima proxy at 70/70 Faith

limitations: Vanguard Decisive setup payoff is an assumption row.
Ramza defense armor class is a W5 proxy, not final equipment data.
